allow: PowerShell($path = 'C:\\Git\\ElasticMint\\website\\docs\\wp-content\\themes\\ElasticMint\\style.css'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $oldBlock = '.copy::after{content:"";display:block;clear:both}.copy .copy-right{margin-top:-1.2rem}.fabe-badge{display:block;width:6rem;height:6rem;border-radius:50%}'; if \(-not $content.Contains\($oldBlock\)\) { Write-Output 'OLD BLOCK NOT FOUND'; exit 1 }; $newBlock = '.fabe-col{margin-left:auto;padding:0 2rem;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:flex-end}.fabe-badge{display:block;width:8rem;height:8rem;border-radius:50%}'; $new = $content.Replace\($oldBlock, $newBlock\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new\); Write-Output 'OK')

PowerShell($path = 'C:\\Git\\ElasticMint\\website\\docs\\wp-content\\themes\\ElasticMint\\style.css'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $old = '.fabe-badge{display:block;width:8rem;height:8rem;border-radius:50%}'; if \(-not $content.Contains\($old\)\) { Write-Output 'NOT FOUND'; exit 1 }; $new = $content.Replace\($old, '.fabe-badge{display:block;width:11rem;height:11rem;border-radius:50%}'\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new\); Write-Output 'OK')

PowerShell($path = 'C:\\Git\\ElasticMint\\website\\src\\_includes\\footer.njk'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $needle = "`r`n`r`n`r`n`r`n`r`n`t`t`t`t`t`t"; $idx = $content.IndexOf\($needle\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { Write-Output 'NEEDLE NOT FOUND'; exit 1 }; $endMarker = ''; $endIdx = $content.IndexOf\($endMarker, $idx\) + $endMarker.Length; $removed = $content.Substring\($idx, $endIdx - $idx\); Write-Output \('Removing ' + $removed.Length + ' chars'\); $new = $content.Substring\(0, $idx\) + $content.Substring\($endIdx\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new\); Write-Output 'OK')
